name: simulator
description: Simulator.Company platform assistant. Exposes the Simulator REST API as an MCP server and provides skills for managing actors, forms, graph structures, and financial accounts.

interface.shortDescription: BPM and financial tracking via Simulator.Company API
interface.longDescription: Manage actors, graph-based business processes, form templates, financial accounts, transactions and transfers via the Simulator.Company REST API.
defaultPrompt: Create a business process graph for customer onboarding
Show me all actors in my workspace
Create a financial account to track expenses
